initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT SUM(Match.away_team_goal) AS total_away_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON (
    Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id OR
    Match.away_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
)
WHERE Player.player_name IN ('Daan Smith', 'Filipe Ferreira');

SELECT SUM(Match.away_team_goal) AS total_away_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player ON (
    Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id OR

)
WHERE Player.player_name IN ('Daan Smith', 'Filipe Ferreira');

SELECT SUM(Match.away_team_goal) AS total_away_goals
FROM Match
JOIN Player p1 ON Match.away_player_X1 = p1.player_api_id
JOIN Player p2 ON Match.away_player_X2 = p2.player_api_id
JOIN Player p3 ON Match.away_player_X3 = p3.player_api_id
JOIN Player p4 ON Match.away_player_X4 = p4.player_api_id
JOIN Player p5 ON Match.away_player_X5 = p5.player_api_id
JOIN Player p6 ON Match.away_player_X6 = p6.player_api_id
JOIN Player p7 ON Match.away_player_X7 = p7.player_api_id
JOIN Player p8 ON Match.away_player_X8 = p8.player_api_id
JOIN Player p9 ON Match.away_player_X1 = p9.player_api_id
JOIN Player p10 ON Match.away_player_X10 = p10.player_api_id
JOIN Player p11 ON Match.away_player_X11 = p11.player_api_id
WHERE p1.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p2.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p3.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p4.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p5.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p6.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p7.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p8.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p9.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p10.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p11.player_name = 'Daan Smith'
   OR p1.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p2.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p3.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p4.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p5.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p6.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p7.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p8.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p9.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p10.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira'
   OR p11.player_name = 'Filipe Ferreira';

JOIN Player p1 ON Match.away_player_X1 = p1.player_api_id
JOIN Player p2 ON Match.away_player_X2 = p2.player_api_id
